Package calendar.controller.parser

Class CopyEventsBetweenParams.Builder

  • java.lang.Object
    • calendar.controller.parser.CopyEventsBetweenParams.Builder
  • Enclosing class:
    CopyEventsBetweenParams
    public static class CopyEventsBetweenParams.Builder
extends java.lang.Object
    Builder for CopyEventsBetweenParams. Provides a fluent API with validation.

    • Method Detail

      • startDate

        public CopyEventsBetweenParams.Builder startDate​(java.time.LocalDate startDate)
        Sets the start date of the interval to copy.
        Parameters:
        startDate - the inclusive start date (required)
        Returns:
        this builder

      • endDate

        public CopyEventsBetweenParams.Builder endDate​(java.time.LocalDate endDate)
        Sets the end date of the interval to copy.
        Parameters:
        endDate - the inclusive end date (required, must be >= startDate)
        Returns:
        this builder

      • targetCalendar

        public CopyEventsBetweenParams.Builder targetCalendar​(java.lang.String targetCalendar)
        Sets the target calendar name.
        Parameters:
        targetCalendar - the destination calendar name (required)
        Returns:
        this builder

      • targetStartDate

        public CopyEventsBetweenParams.Builder targetStartDate​(java.time.LocalDate targetStartDate)
        Sets the target start date for the copied interval.
        Parameters:
        targetStartDate - the start date in the target calendar (required)
        Returns:
        this builder

      • build

        public CopyEventsBetweenParams build()
        Builds the CopyEventsBetweenParams instance.
        Returns:
        a new CopyEventsBetweenParams instance
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - if any required field is missing or invalid
